<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Visibility; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Param; use PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Class_; use PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Property; class PropertyProtectedToPrivate extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'Visibility'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Mutates a protected property to a private property'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' protected bool $foo = true; // [tl! remove] private bool $foo = true; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [Property::class, Param::class]; } #[\Override] public static function can(Node $node): bool { if ($node instanceof Property && $node->isProtected()) { return true; } return $node instanceof Param && $node->flags === Class_::MODIFIER_PROTECTED; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var Property $node */ $node->flags = Class_::MODIFIER_PRIVATE; return $node; } }
